name: Alcohol Exportation Drawback

eligibility.description: Available to exporters, bottlers, or packagers of distilled spirits and wines who file a claim and ensure products are marked specifically for export.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows for a refund (drawback) of internal revenue taxes paid on distilled spirits or wines that are subsequently exported from the United States.
